question: Which customers have integration platform details "Fail" in interactions? Give me the customer details.
sql: SELECT Customers.Customer_Details FROM Customers JOIN Customer_Interactions ON Customers.Customer_ID = Customer_Interactions.Customer_ID JOIN Integration_Platform ON Customer_Interactions.Customer_Interaction_ID = Integration_Platform.Customer_Interaction_ID WHERE Integration_Platform.Integration_Platform_Details = 'Fail'

semantic.reason: 过滤条件应作用于Customer_Interactions表的Integration_Platform_Details字段而非独立表Integration_Platform，且未体现表关联逻辑
